title: hymenophyllum capillare
intro: Hymenophyllum capillare, also known as the fern-like Hymenophyllaceae, is a species of small, delicate fern native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Australia, New Zealand, and parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum capillare include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and treat various infections. Hymenophyllum capillare is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its extracts have also been used in herbal remedies to promote health and well-being.
